title: Optimized Features
description: Optimizes your game to the maximum while adding useful features, animations and aesthetics.
body:
![The big logo of the modpack. It says 'Optimized Features'. 'Optimized' has light blue glazed terracotta as an background and 'Features' has an background with bamboo mosaic with a slight hue. The 'i' in 'Optimized' also has an outstanding dot.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70b99136d8517da6fb81b6e52f7ef783953f494b.png)

## Introducing Optimized Features!
Explore the unparalleled Minecraft optimization modpack! Encounter seamless gameplay, lightning-quick loading speeds, and a performance surge that will elevate your gaming experience to new heights! This modpack not only elevates performance but also incorporates shader compatibility, zoom features, cohesive textures, world map and minimap, animations, blinking to your skins, particles, ability to play with friends without making a server, cosmetics, and many more features.
## Why Optimized Features?
The goal of Optimized Features is to:
- perfect the already existing game
- make the game playable for players who have potato PCs and want to use shaders
- make the game more beautiful
## Works Anywhere
This modpack works anywhere because all the mods are client side. You can even use this modpack in different launchers.
## Support or Issues?
If you have any problems, feature suggestions or other you can join my helpful [Discord](https://discord.gg/XGxBGrJjkA).
### Thanks
Big thanks to [Julian499](https://www.youtube.com/@CreepyCreeper499) for the support.
